meta.name: Simple
meta.description: 4-quadrant sampler world. UR: kick density (Y) + hihat density (X) @ 111 BPM. UL: Portal-style granular FX on charlie buffer — X=pitch/rate macro, Y=grain size/overlap macro, with XY-modulated filter + delay. BL: charlie sample with lowpass filter. BR: rain sample with mirrored lowpass filter. BL+BR crossfade and extend up into UL/UR via 2D audibility rectangles.
